spine: every buried obligation — known, owned, one tap. mail is the first feed; you tend only the handful you decide matters.

obligations.title: Fraud alert — verify first — Stripe
obligations.next_step: VERIFY the sender is genuine (fraud notices are heavily spoofed — do NOT click links). If real, call the number on the back of the card.
sample_subjects: Unrecognized device signed in to your Stripe account

obligations.title: Student loan — default risk — Nelnet
obligations.next_step: Log in at nelnet.studentaid.gov: check default status, recertify the income-driven repayment plan, and set the lowest viable payment.
sample_subjects: Final reminder, ANTHONY - your loan is about to default

obligations.title: Billing — payment failed — Anthropic
obligations.next_step: Root cause is the card-0186 hold — resolve THAT first, then update the payment method here. (Cascades to Anthropic / Google Cloud / GitHub.)
sample_subjects: Your subscription access has been paused

obligations.title: KYC / identity verification — Stripe
obligations.next_step: Provide the exact info requested. Note: Stripe KYC is blocked on the dead LLC — prefer the individual monetization rail (Ko-fi/Lemon Squeezy).
sample_subjects: [Action required] Provide information about Et4l

obligations.title: Personal — reply owed — Apple Developer
obligations.next_step: A real person wrote you — read and reply by precedent (match your prior tone with this correspondent).
obligations.why: precedent: sender looks like a real human, no protocol matched
obligations.draft_hint: Reply in your own voice; answer their question or set the next step.
sample_subjects: Dive deeper into WWDC26 announcements.
obligations.draft_text:
Hi Apple,

Thank you for your message regarding "Dive deeper into WWDC26 announcements.".

[Reply in your own voice; answer their question or set the next step.]

[Add your specifics here, then send.]

Best,
Anthony

levers.label: Expand the Gmail MCP connector to write scope (gmail.modify) in claude.ai — one-time, Anthropic-managed refresh; unlocks reliable keyless Gmail archive + drafts in any live session.

Generate a Google app-password (account.google.com → Security → App passwords) — unlocks reliable Gmail archive/draft over direct IMAP for the headless daemon; no weekly token death, no browser-driving.
Revive the Gmail OAuth app: fresh consent + flip to Production publishing (stops the 7-day testing-mode token expiry). I can browser-drive the consent when you want it.
Set LIMEN_NTFY_TOPIC to get high-priority obligations pushed to your phone (opt-in; no topic = no push).
